name: Steady Breath
description: Breath control is the foundation of singing. Let's build a steady, even exhale.

feedback.intro: We'll calibrate your mic first (stay quiet for 2 seconds). Then hum or sing 'aah' at a steady volume. The bar fills when you sustain — keep it even.
feedback.waiting: Take a deep breath in, then hum steadily...
feedback.complete: You held {reps} steady breaths. Breath support is how singers sustain notes without strain.
feedback.tip: Think of your breath as a column of air. You're balancing it, not pushing it.
